clinical_rationale: Heart rate monitoring for neonatal patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for neonatal patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for neonatal patients; critical for thermoregulation assessment
Oxygen saturation monitoring for neonatal patients; essential for respiratory assessment
Weight measurement for neonatal growth monitoring per WHO standards
Head circumference for neonatal brain development monitoring per WHO standards
Heart rate monitoring for infant patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for infant patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for infant patients
Oxygen saturation monitoring for infant patients; normal >94%
Weight measurement for infant growth monitoring per WHO growth charts
Length measurement for infant growth monitoring per WHO growth charts
Head circumference for infant brain development monitoring (birth to 2 years critical)
Heart rate monitoring for toddler patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for toddler patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for toddler patients
Oxygen saturation monitoring for toddler patients
Weight measurement for toddler growth monitoring per WHO growth charts
Height measurement for toddler growth monitoring per WHO growth charts
Head circumference for brain development monitoring in early childhood (measured until 3 years)
Mid-upper arm circumference for malnutrition screening per WHO guidelines; <115mm indicates severe acute malnutrition
Triceps skinfold for nutritional assessment in young children per WHO standards
Heart rate monitoring for preschool patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for preschool patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for preschool patients
Oxygen saturation monitoring for preschool patients
Weight measurement for preschool growth monitoring and BMI calculation
Height measurement for preschool growth monitoring; required for blood pressure percentile calculation
Systolic blood pressure screening begins at age 3 per AAP 2017 guidelines; annual screening required
Diastolic blood pressure screening begins at age 3 per AAP 2017 guidelines; annual screening required
Heart rate monitoring for school-age patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for school-age patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for school-age patients
Oxygen saturation monitoring for school-age patients
Weight measurement for school-age growth monitoring and BMI calculation
Height measurement for school-age growth monitoring; required for BP percentile calculation per AAP guidelines
Heart rate monitoring for adolescent patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Respiratory rate monitoring for adolescent patients per PALS 2020-2025 guidelines
Temperature monitoring for adolescent patients
Oxygen saturation monitoring for adolescent patients
Weight measurement for adolescent growth monitoring and BMI calculation
Height measurement for adolescent growth completion monitoring
Systolic BP using simplified thresholds for adolescents ≥13 years per AAP 2017 (Elevated: 120-129, HTN Stage 1: 130-139, Stage 2: ≥140)
Diastolic BP using simplified thresholds for adolescents ≥13 years per AAP 2017 (HTN Stage 1: 80-89, Stage 2: ≥90)
Height measurement for adult health assessment and BMI calculation
Weight measurement for adult health assessment and BMI calculation
Temperature monitoring for adult patients; fever >38°C (100.4°F)
Systolic blood pressure monitoring for adult patients per AHA/ACC 2025 guidelines; target <130 mmHg for most adults
Diastolic blood pressure monitoring for adult patients per AHA/ACC 2025 guidelines; target <80 mmHg
Oxygen saturation monitoring for adult patients; normal ≥95% at sea level
Blood glucose monitoring for diabetes screening and management per ADA 2025 standards; normal fasting 70-100 mg/dL
Heart rate monitoring for adult patients; normal resting 60-100 bpm
Respiratory rate monitoring for adult patients; normal 12-20 breaths/minute
